# OAuth Provider Comparative Analysis

## Comparison Targets

| Provider | Cost/Month | SLA | Ease of Migration |
|----------|-----------|-----|-------------------|
| Auth0 | $230 | 99.99% | High |
| Clerk | $150 | 99.9% | Medium |
| Supabase Auth | $25 | 99.5% | Low |

## Conclusion

Auth0 offers the best balance. While the cost is higher, the SLA and richness of migration tools are the deciding factors. Clerk is the runner-up and sufficient for startups. Supabase Auth has the lowest cost but is insufficient for enterprise requirements.
